title: rubus × plusiadenius
intro: Rubus × plusiadenius, also known as the Himalayan Raspberry or Himalayan Wild Raspberry, is a hybrid plant species of the Rubus genus. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, and is rich in antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals. The plant's leaves and stems have been used to prepare herbal remedies that promote digestive health, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system, making it beneficial for treating conditions such as diarrhea, dysentery, and fever. Rubus × plusiadenius can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is also consumed raw in its fruit form to reap its health benefits.
